codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly configures the environment variables required to use `@midscene/computer` with the Gemini API and successfully initializes the agent in the Electron main process.

issues.description: The `agentFromComputer()` function is called but the resulting agent instance is not saved to a variable. While this meets the basic initialization requirement and passes type checks, a subsequent feature will likely need to refactor this to capture the agent instance for actual use.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker researched how to configure @midscene/computer to use Gemini and discovered that setting OPENAI_BASE_URL to the Gemini OpenAI-compatible endpoint and mapping GOOGLE_API_KEY to OPENAI_API_KEY was required, but failed to document this knowledge in .factory/library/.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows worker searching for 'midscene gemini model configuration 2026' and then adding the OPENAI_BASE_URL override logic in main.ts, but there is no file creation or update to .factory/library/ to record this pattern for future workers.

summary: Passed review. Midscene environment variables and initialization are correctly implemented.
